The '''Ten Tempests system''', also known as the '''Vortex system''', was a [[Star system/Legends|star system]] located within the [[Glythe sector/Legends|Glythe sector]] of the [[Mid Rim/Legends|Mid Rim]] that contained the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Vortex/Legends|Vortex]].

{{System-stub}}
